creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Yes, options EARLY_AP_STARTUP is defined. 

This kernel config file is used:
include GENERIC
ident   SUPERMICRO
options		IPSEC_SUPPORT
nooptions       IPSEC
# RACK
options         TCPHPTS
options         RATELIMIT
# Route
options         ROUTE_MPATH
options		FIB_ALGO

Some additional modules are also loaded early:
zfs_load="YES"
ichwd_load="YES"
aio_load="YES"
accf_dns_load="YES"
cc_htcp_load="YES"
carp_load="YES"
tcpmd5_load="YES"
ipsec_load="YES"
